message:
build(deps): replace ratatui with portable-pty, bump asupersync to 0.1.1

Remove ratatui and ~30 transitive dependencies (termwiz, wezterm-*,
pest, strum, syn 1.x, etc). Add portable-pty for PTY-based TUI
architecture. Bump asupersync from 0.1.0 to 0.1.1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
